title: Animated rating star
design_intent: Design intent for anim-241: make Animated rating star legible as a reanimated state change, preserve focus and layout stability, and communicate the same meaning when reduced motion removes animation.
reference_inspiration: Reference for anim-241: derive timing and easing from the Animated rating star state change itself; use reanimated platform conventions only to calibrate duration, interruption, and reduced-motion behavior.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Respect prefers-reduced-motion, focus order, and interruption behavior for Animated rating star.
motion_reasoning: anim-241 uses reanimated on mobile for Animated rating star. The motion must express The design intent is to make the state change legible without adding decorative motion or layout instability., survive interruption, preserve focus order, honor reduced motion, and keep animated work on transform or opacity where possible.

performance_strategy.what_animates: Respect prefers-reduced-motion, focus order, and interruption behavior for Animated rating star.
performance_strategy.thread_management: Keep gesture/motion state on the animation thread for Animated rating star; React state updates only at committed milestones.
performance_strategy.gpu_considerations: Animate only transform/opacity for Animated rating star; avoid layout-affecting properties and validate no long paint blocks.
performance_strategy.interrupt_handling: Interrupt by cancelling the active timeline, preserving focus, and snapping to the nearest semantic state for Animated rating star.

accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion, focus order, and interruption behavior for Animated rating star.
accessibility.screen_reader: Respect prefers-reduced-motion, focus order, and interruption behavior for Animated rating star.
accessibility.vestibular_safety: Respect prefers-reduced-motion, focus order, and interruption behavior for Animated rating star.

interaction_details: Respect prefers-reduced-motion, focus order, and interruption behavior for Animated rating star.
what_breaks_naive_approach: A naive animation for Animated rating star only checks the first visual impression. It breaks when reanimated on mobile is interrupted, focus changes mid-transition, reduced-motion users need an instant equivalent, or layout and paint work exceed the frame budget.

title: Final: Motion as craft
design_intent: Design intent for anim-250: make Final: Motion as craft legible as a motion principles state change, preserve focus and layout stability, and communicate the same meaning when reduced motion removes animation.
reference_inspiration: Reference for anim-250: Apple, Linear, Stripe — they invest in motion as first-class.; apply it narrowly to Final: Motion as craft's timing, easing, and affordance, not as decorative motion.
motion_reasoning: anim-250 uses motion principles on both for Final: Motion as craft. The motion must express Animation is craft — invisible when good, painful when bad. Treat with same rigor as code., survive interruption, preserve focus order, honor reduced motion, and keep animated work on transform or opacity where possible.

performance_strategy.what_animates: transform + opacity by default; avoid layout properties

interaction_details: Every team member uses the same tokens
what_breaks_naive_approach: A naive animation for Final: Motion as craft only checks the first visual impression. It breaks when motion principles on both is interrupted, focus changes mid-transition, reduced-motion users need an instant equivalent, or layout and paint work exceed the frame budget.
